sentences.arabic: يَبِيعُ الرَّجُلُ الفَاكِهَةَ فِي عَرَبَةٍ صَغِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Muškarac prodaje voće na malim kolicima.
sentences.translationEn: The man sells fruit from a small cart.

sentences.arabic: يَصِيحُ بِصَوْتٍ عَالٍ: تَفَّاحٌ وَبُرْتُقَالٌ طَازَجٌ.
sentences.translation: Viče glasno: Svježe jabuke i naranče.
sentences.translationEn: He calls out loudly: Fresh apples and oranges.

sentences.translation: Žena se zaustavila i pitala za cijenu.
sentences.translationEn: A woman stopped and asked about the price.

sentences.translation: Kupila je kilo jabuka i brzo platila.
sentences.translationEn: She bought a kilo of apples and paid quickly.
